underlying_goal: Fix the /health/services endpoint that was hanging the server due to Chroma health check failures when running without Docker, and implement a proper fallback architecture
friction_detail: Multiple fix attempts (asyncio.to_thread wrapper, urllib with socket timeout, sync conversion) failed to address the real root cause—DNS resolution of Docker hostname bypassing socket timeouts—requiring the user to redirect toward a background probe architecture
brief_summary: User needed to fix a hanging Chroma health check that broke the server; after several failed fix attempts, Claude eventually implemented a background probe pattern that resolved the issue and was committed with documentation.
